name: Browser Use

agentGuide.summary: Use Browser Use when a coding agent needs a separate browser-fulfillment worker for long or delegated web tasks.
useCases: Start a browser worker from an existing agent session.
Hand off a web task that needs OttoAuth browser state or an Anthropic-backed worker.
Check missing setup before asking the human for an API key or profile path.
